name: Jamie's Apartment
atmosphere: Sterile, quiet, slightly cold, vulnerable, modern but impersonal

global_visual_rules.lighting_base: Low-key, natural moonlight from windows, sparse artificial light
global_visual_rules.texture_focus: Smooth surfaces, glass, cold tiles, soft fabrics (contrast)
global_visual_rules.camera_style: Static shots for isolation, slow pans for exploration, voyeuristic angles

entrance_hallway.description: A narrow, dimly lit corridor connecting the entrance to the rest of the apartment. The walls are painted a dark slate grey.
entrance_hallway.lighting: Very low, single overhead bulb or street light filtering through the door
entrance_hallway.sound_profile: Echoey footsteps, muffled city noise from outside
entrance_hallway.ai_prompt_keywords: narrow hallway, dark grey walls, intercom, shadowy, depth of field, cinematic noir

bathroom.description: A modern, clean space with white tiles and a large bathtub. It represents Jamie's attempt at peace and self-care.
bathroom.lighting: Soft, diffused, warm if candles are lit, otherwise cold white
bathroom.ai_prompt_keywords: modern bathroom, white tiles, bathtub with rose petals, steam, serene, clean lines, 8k

living_room.description: The main space, sparsely furnished. It feels large and empty, emphasizing Jamie's solitude.
living_room.lighting: Moonlight casting long shadows, occasional street light flickers
living_room.ai_prompt_keywords: spacious living room, grey sofa, minimalist decor, moonlight shadows, lonely atmosphere, wide angle

kitchen.description: Functional and modern, connected to the living area. A place of routine that becomes a place of tension.
kitchen.sound_profile: Fridge hum, glass clinking, water pouring
kitchen.ai_prompt_keywords: modern kitchen, white cabinets, stainless steel, cold lighting, sleek, reflective surfaces

bedroom.description: Jamie's private sanctuary. The most intimate space, violated by Franz's gaze in Episode 4.
bedroom.lighting: Dim bedside lamp or street light filtering through curtains
bedroom.ai_prompt_keywords: bedroom interior, large mirror, white linens, dim lighting, intimate, reflection shot, cinematic

fixed_elements: The intercom is always on the right side of the entrance door
The bedroom mirror is large and faces the door/corridor
The sofa is always grey and positioned against the main wall
The bathroom tiles are always white and glossy
variable_elements: Lighting intensity (depends on time of day/night)
Presence of rose petals (only in Ep 4 bathroom scene)
Broken glass on the floor (post-Episode 4 climax)

ai_production_notes.consistency_tips: Use the same seed or reference image for the apartment layout across all episodes to maintain spatial coherence. Ensure the 'cold' color temperature is maintained unless Anthony is present (bringing warmth).
